subject: Two figures in confrontation — a light-haired young fighter (Trunks) facing off against Baby in his blue humanoid form, tension visible between them
description: Two figures are shown in clear confrontation. In the foreground on the left is a light-haired young male in casual clothing — reading as Trunks from the card set context — standing turned toward the right. On the right side is a blue-skinned figure with lean physique — Baby in his Tuffle Parasite humanoid form — glowering with visible hostility. The two figures face each other with clear antagonism. The background is relatively simple, with colored energy tones separating the two. This is a duo confrontation card showing the victim-and-parasite dynamic of the Baby Saga.
foreground: Light-haired youth (left) and blue-skinned Baby (right) facing each other in confrontation
